files.title: Kiub Store / Listing Cover Images
files.purpose: Hero / store-listing / promo cover images for every Kiub distribution surface — Chrome new tab, Opera new tab, Chrome extension (multiple variants), and the Slack app. One Figma page per surface, with the '5' frame typically being the primary Chrome Web Store hero.

files.title: Kiub Marketing Site — landing pages
files.purpose: Marketing landing pages, hero sections, FAQs, waiting-list announcements, and onboarding promo for Kiub. Desktop and mobile.

files.title: Kiub Web App — UI source of truth
files.purpose: Production UI for the Kiub web app: home dashboard, tasks, notes, bookmarks, URL/highlight detail, settings, subscription, onboarding, sign-up/login, and shared components. Desktop and mobile, light and dark.

pages.purpose: Hero/store covers for the Kiub Chrome new-tab experience. 'A new tab for what's important' headline, dark sunset Mt. Fuji background. Frames 1–5 are size variants for store; '440 x 280' is the Chrome Web Store thumbnail size; 'Browsing habit' is a section asset.
pages.search_blob:
Kiub Store / Listing Cover Images 
 Hero / store-listing / promo cover images for every Kiub distribution surface — Chrome new tab, Opera new tab, Chrome extension (multiple variants), and the Slack app. One Figma page per surface, with the '5' frame typically being the primary Chrome Web Store hero.
 
 Chrome (browser new tab) 
 Hero/store covers for the Kiub Chrome new-tab experience. 'A new tab for what's important' headline, dark sunset Mt. Fuji background. Frames 1–5 are size variants for store; '440 x 280' is the Chrome Web Store thumbnail size; 'Browsing habit' is a section asset.
 
 chrome new-tab hero store-listing 440x280 browsing-habit mount-fuji dark-theme 
 cover-image hero chrome-web-store store-listing promo opera chrome slack chrome-ext new-tab 
 primary-hero store-thumbnail 
 5 1 440 x 280 2 3 4 JUNK Browsing habit
